title: The Boys from Biloxi
author: John Grisham
description: In the late 1960s, the city of Biloxi, Mississippi, was a gambler's paradise, a humid, vibrant, and dangerous place. Keith Odell, a young prosecutor, was determined to clean up the town. He took on the city's most powerful figures, including the notorious racketeer Meyer Lansky. The case would put Odell and his family in grave danger. The Boys from Biloxi is a true story of courage, corruption, and the fight for justice.
